summary: The diff modifies backend/main.mo and project_state.json. The backend/main.mo continues to use Motoko stable variables and actor-based data structures with no external database dependencies introduced. The project_state.json still references SQLite3 in its summary description but no actual SQLite3 dependency is added to the backend code. REQ-12 is largely satisfied by the backend code, but the project_state.json summary string still mentions 'SQLite3 (database)' without clarification that it is unsupported.

missing_requirements.requirement: The user has requested SQLite3 as the database layer. This platform uses Motoko on the Internet Computer as the backend, which does not support external databases such as SQLite3. The clarification of this unsupported request should be reflected appropriately.
missing_requirements.reason: The project_state.json summary still explicitly states 'SQLite3 (database)' as part of the tech stack description without any correction or clarification that SQLite3 is unsupported. The build request title is 'Clarify unsupported database request (SQLite3)', implying the project state or documentation should be updated to reflect that SQLite3 is not supported and Motoko stable variables are used instead.
